subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast remained steadfast in the ancient Covenant! Spread forth the hands of supplication unto the Kingdom of Glory and the Dawning-place of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی العهد القدیم فابسط اکف الابتهال الی ملکوت الجلال و مطلع الجمال
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
